revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{used in system}} == Usage == Meta template that returns the first parameter if evaluated during substitution, and the second parameter if evaluated during transclusion.
Note that this template must be used in [[mw:Manual:Substitution#Multilevel_substitution|safesubst]] mode to work properly: : {{ safesubst:ifsubst| yes | no }} The {{para|demo}} parameter can be used for testing the template. Set {{para|demo|yes}} to always display the ''yes'' text, {{para|demo|no}} to always display the ''no'' text, or {{para|demo|{{{demo|}}}}} to pass through the value from the parent template. {{List of subst helper templates}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{used in system}} == Usage == Meta template that returns the first parameter if evaluated during substitution, and the second parameter if evaluated during transclusion.
Note that this template must be used in [[mw:Manual:Substitution#Multilevel_substitution|safesubst]] mode to work properly: : {{ safesubst:ifsubst| yes | no }} The {{para|demo}} parameter can be used for testing the template. Set {{para|demo|yes}} to always display the ''yes'' text, {{para|demo|no}} to always display the ''no'' text, or {{para|demo|{{{demo|}}}}} to pass through the value from the parent template. {{List of subst helper templates}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:If-then-else templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{used in system}} == Usage == Meta template that returns the first parameter if evaluated during substitution, and the second parameter if evaluated during transclusion.
Note that this template must be used in [[mw:Manual:Substitution#Multilevel_substitution|safesubst]] mode to work properly: : {{ safesubst:ifsubst| yes | no }} The {{para|demo}} parameter can be used for testing the template. Set {{para|demo|yes}} to always display the ''yes'' text, {{para|demo|no}} to always display the ''no'' text, or {{para|demo|{{{demo|}}}}} to pass through the value from the parent template. {{List of subst helper templates}} {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:If-then-else templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{used in system}} == Usage == Meta template that returns the first parameter if evaluated during substitution, and the second parameter if evaluated during transclusion.
Note that this template must be used in [[mw:Manual:Substitution#Multilevel_substitution|safesubst]] mode to work properly: : {{ safesubst:ifsubst| yes | no }} The {{para|demo}} parameter can be used for testing the template. Set {{para|demo|yes}} to always display the ''yes'' text, {{para|demo|no}} to always display the ''no'' text, or {{para|demo|{{{demo|}}}}} to pass through the value from the parent template. {{List of subst helper templates}} {{Sandbox other| | }} [[Category:Wikipedia metatemplates]] [[Category:If-then-else templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
